untranslatable_reason: Signal requires statistical correlation coefficient calculation between past returns (over lookback period) and future returns with p-value significance testing. This requires custom statistical function not available in allowed indicators. The correlation analysis, optimal parameter pair selection (60,10), (60,25), (250,10), (250,25), (250,60), (250,120), and forward-looking predictive power assessment cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: This is a mean-reversion strategy that fundamentally depends on computing Pearson correlation between two return series and assessing statistical significance—operations not supported by the allowed indicator set. The signal cannot be accurately translated without correlation coefficient and p-value calculation capabilities.
